brand_dna.category: Decorative home safety hardware - grab bars and bath accessories that disguise fall-prevention as elegant fixtures.
brand_dna.core_belief: That bathing should be a safe, beautiful, and tranquil experience, and that safety, beauty, easy installation and affordability do not have to be mutually exclusive.
proof_points: LiveSafe Mounting System included FREE in every box - two hollow wall anchors and two stud mount flanges
System supports up to 500lbs in hollow wall substrates and studs
ADA compliant models with 1-1/4 inch diameter and nubby rubber grips
Product designs based on research with hundreds of end users in residential and senior living environments
brand_dna.positioning: Premium yet affordable design-forward alternative to institutional-looking grab bars - safety that looks like decor, not a hospital.

voice_pillars.name: Safety Without Sacrifice
voice_pillars.desc: Frames every product as proof you never have to trade protection for good looks.
voice_pillars.quote: Why choose between safety and style when you can have both?

voice_pillars.name: Dignity-Driven
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks to preserving independence and pride, not to frailty or decline.
voice_pillars.quote: prevent falls, preserve dignity, enhance home accessibility and promote independent living

voice_pillars.name: Research-Backed Confidence
voice_pillars.desc: Leans on real end-user research and specifics to earn trust in a high-stakes purchase.
voice_pillars.quote: We know the high risk fall zones in the bathroom, what causes people to fall

voice_pillars.name: Discreetly Beautiful
voice_pillars.desc: Positions grab bars as hidden-in-plain-sight decor that upgrades a room.
voice_pillars.quote: disguises grab bars as bath accessories, discretely providing the safety of grab bars

phrases: transforms your bathroom's most vulnerable moment into a confident, secure experience
age in place with confidence and style
the perfect blend of functionality and elegance
secure support exactly when you're reaching for towels
Perfect Balance of Safety and Style

icp: Adults 50+ aging in place and the caregivers or families buying for them, who want a safer bathroom without it looking like a hospital and will pay more for hardware that is both secure and beautiful.

personas.name: The Design-Conscious Aging-in-Placer
personas.description: A homeowner 55+ who refuses an institutional bathroom and is moved by 'safety and style' framing plus finishes that match their decor.

personas.name: The Protective Caregiver
personas.description: An adult child or spouse buying for a loved one, moved by fall-zone research, 500lb support, and dignity-preserving language.

personas.name: The Reseller / Specifier
personas.description: A contractor, senior-living buyer, or dealer moved by free mounting hardware, same-day response, and next-day shipping.

offers: Free shipping on retail orders over $100
30-day return policy on eligible items in original packaging with proof of purchase
LiveSafe Mounting System and Mount Daddy anchors included FREE in every box
Subscribe & Save option and newsletter for sales and new releases
Large quantity / reseller pricing and affiliate program

allowed.claim: Supports up to 500lbs in hollow wall substrates that support the weight load as well as in studs.
ADA compliant grab bars with 1-1/4 inch diameter.
LiveSafe Mounting System with anchors and flanges included free in every box.
Free shipping on retail orders over $100.
Designs based on research with hundreds of end users in residential and senior living environments.

banned.claim: Prevents all falls or guarantees you will never fall.
banned.why: Unqualified disease/injury-prevention claim the product cannot back; overstates a support aid as a medical guarantee.

banned.claim: Treats, cures, or prevents any medical condition (e.g. arthritis, balance disorders).
banned.why: Disease-treatment claims are banned for this category and unsupported by the product.

banned.claim: Guaranteed to hold 500lbs on any wall.
banned.why: Overstates the site's qualified spec, which specifies substrates that support the weight load - must stay qualified.

banned.claim: Medical-grade or clinically proven safety device.
banned.why: No certification or clinical testing shown in the input; would be an unsupported claim.

banned.claim: The 60% of bathroom falls stat used without a cited source.
banned.why: Nutrient/statistical-style claims must match verifiable data; run only with a credible citation to avoid a substantiation issue.
